strategies.name: SMA Crossover
strategies.description: Goes long when a fast SMA crosses above a slow SMA; exits when the cross reverses.

strategies.name: RSI Mean Reversion
strategies.description: Enters long when RSI crosses above the oversold threshold; exits when RSI crosses above the overbought threshold.

strategies.name: IFVG + CISD
strategies.description: Daily adaptation of the FYP strategy: requires both an Inverse Fair Value Gap and a Change in State of Delivery to confirm before entering.
